articles.title: Parag: 'If we keep playing like this, we shouldn't be in contention for top four'

articles.title: Axar, Ashutosh, Starc keep Delhi Capitals' playoffs hopes alive

articles.title: Pakistan lose eight WTC points for slow over rate in first Test against Bangladesh

articles.title: IPL 2026: ‘RCB feels like home’ - Venkatesh Iyer reflects after match-winning knock against Punjab Kings

articles.description: Starc would end his four-over spell with figures of 4 for 40, after also taking the wicket of Sri Lanka's Dasun Shanaka towards the end.
